  "findings": [
    "Rebar resting directly on the vapor barrier and soil",
    "Missing support chairs along the near edge",
    "Rebar touching the side formwork"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install approved chairs or bolsters to lift the rebar mat to the specified bottom cover height",
    "Reposition and secure rebar to maintain the required side clearance from the formwork",
    "Re-inspect the vapor barrier for punctures and repair if damaged during rebar adjustment"
  ],
  "rationale": "The rebar placement fails inspection because the reinforcement lacks the required concrete cover. Resting directly on the ground and touching the side forms will lead to rapid corrosion, structural degradation, and failure to meet ACI 318 cover requirements.",
  "references": [
    "ACI 318 Section 20.6.1 (Concrete Cover Requirements)",
    "ACI 301 Specifications for Concrete Construction"
  ]
}
